# terrible_community_general_keyring (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `keyring_password` (String) Password to unlock keyring.
- `service` (String) The name of the service.
- `username` (String) The user belonging to the service.

### Optional

- `state` (String) Whether the password should exist.
- `user_password` (String) The password to set.
